entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for trait preferences among value chain actors.

entities.name: NORTHERN GHANA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study on groundnut value chain actors was conducted.

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The social characteristic used to analyze differences in trait preferences and willingness to pay.

entities.name: TRAIT PREFERENCES
entities.description: The specific characteristics of a crop that are desired by value chain actors.

entities.name: CROP BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs designed to develop improved crop varieties based on user demands.

entities.name: STATED PREFERENCE METHOD
entities.description: A research technique used to characterize preferences and willingness to pay for crop attributes.

entities.name: WILLINGNESS TO PAY
entities.description: The maximum amount of money that actors are willing to spend for improved crop varieties.

entities.name: PRODUCTION ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: Characteristics of groundnut related to its cultivation and yield.

entities.name: MARKET ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: Characteristics of groundnut that influence its commercial value and demand.

entities.name: NUTRITION ATTRIBUTES
entities.description: Characteristics of groundnut related to its nutritional content and health benefits.

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN ACTORS
entities.description: Individuals involved in the production, processing, and marketing of groundnut.

relationships.description: Influences the preferences for specific crop attributes
Influences the effectiveness and prioritization of breeding goals
Used to characterize and analyze preferences
Used to measure the amount actors are willing to pay
Measured for improved varieties of the crop
Specific traits associated with the production of the crop
